channel.title: Thriving Dancer Podcast
channel.description: Audio-first practice, interview, and reflection episodes for the Thriving Dancer system.
channel.itunes:author: Thriving Dancer
channel.itunes:summary: Audio-first practice, interview, and reflection episodes for the Thriving Dancer system.

item.title: Heather Robles interview — interview notes and takeaways
item.description:
An interview about building an independent dance life across choreography, performance, travel, and care work.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/heather-robles-interview-interview-notes-and-takeaways.html

item.title: Me Behind This Exuberant Dance Number Planning, Precision, and Practice
item.description:
Mandy Moore borrows some steps from this classic Freda Stair and Ginger Rogers routine from the 1935 film top hat.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/me-behind-this-exuberant-dance-number-planning-precision-and-practice.html

item.title: Dave's Gone By Interview- -JAY HANDELMAN & CARRIE SEIDMAN: Local Arts Coverage, Criticism, and Nonprofit Reporting
item.description:
A focused look at shrinking local arts coverage, why criticism still matters, and how nonprofit reporting might keep that work alive.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/dave-s-gone-by-interview-jay-handelman-carrie-seidman-local-arts-coverag.html

item.title: Dance Podcast
item.description:
A process-focused piece about improvisation, projections, and choreographing together inside a shifting group workflow.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/dance-podcast.html

item.title: Clone Dance Party: Local Arts Coverage and Why Criticism Still Matters
item.description:
A focused look at shrinking local arts coverage, why criticism still matters, and how nonprofit reporting might keep that work alive.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/clone-dance-party-local-arts-coverage-and-why-criticism-still-matters.html

item.title: Picking Up Choreography More Quickly
item.description:
A practical look at how previous dance experience can speed up learning new choreography.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/picking-up-choreography-more-quickly.html

item.title: Picking Up Choreography After Years of Salsa
item.description:
A practical look at how previous dance experience can speed up learning new choreography.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/picking-up-choreography-after-years-of-salsa.html

item.title: Intro for Restorative Yoga
item.description:
A gentle restorative practice framed around releasing tension, softening the nervous system, and settling back into a steadier rhythm.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/intro-for-restorative-yoga.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ExrA531sXEc
